2603.28420.title: Spectral Higher-Order Neural Networks
2603.28420.paper_summary: Neural networks are fundamental tools of modern machine learning. The standard paradigm assumes binary interactions (across feedforward linear passes) between inter-tangled units, organized in sequential layers. Generalized architectures have been also designed that move beyond pairwise interactions, so as to account for higher-order couplings among computing neurons. Higher-order networks are however usually deployed as augmented graph neural networks (GNNs), and, as such, prove solely advantageous in contexts where the input exhibits an explicit hypergraph structure. Here, we present Spectral Higher-Order Neural Networks (SHONNs), a new algorithmic strategy to incorporate higher-order interactions in general-purpose, feedforward, network structures. SHONNs leverages a reformulation of the model in terms of spectral attributes. This allows to mitigate the common stability and parameter scaling problems that come along weighted, higher-order, forward propagations.
2603.28420.paper_summary_zh: 神經網絡是現代機器學習的基本工具。標準範式假設在交織的單元之間存在二元互動（通過前饋線性傳遞），這些單元組織在順序層中。也設計了更通用的架構，超越了成對互動，以考慮計算神經元之間的高階耦合。然而，高階網絡通常作為增強型圖神經網絡（GNNs）部署，因此僅在輸入顯示明確超圖結構的情況下才證明有利。在這裡，我們提出了光譜高階神經網絡（SHONNs），這是一種將高階互動納入通用前饋網絡結構的新算法策略。SHONNs 利用模型在光譜屬性方面的重構。這使得能夠減輕隨著加權、高階前向傳播而來的常見穩定性和參數縮放問題。
2603.28420.author: Gianluca Peri et.al.
2603.28420.authors: Gianluca Peri, Timoteo Carletti, Duccio Fanelli, Diego Febbe
